label: 场景
description: 原样透传 scene：输入的整棵 DataTree 不做任何变换直接输出，branches/paths/focus/version 全部保持不变。用于连线、分流或作为管线占位/中转节点。
description-en: Pass a scene through unchanged: the entire input DataTree is emitted as-is with no transform; branches/paths/focus/version are all preserved. Useful for wiring, fan-out, or as a pipeline placeholder/junction.

inputs.name: scene
inputs.label: scene
inputs.description: 输入 scene；整棵 DataTree 将被原样透传，不做任何修改
inputs.description-en: Input scene; the entire DataTree is passed through unchanged.

outputs.name: scene
outputs.label: scene
outputs.description: 与输入完全一致的 scene（同一棵 DataTree，结构零变换）
outputs.description-en: The same scene as the input (identical DataTree, zero transform).
